Risk_Driver: Government budget constraints, delayed APBN allocation
Control_Description: Monthly AR aging monitoring + formal escalation to Ministry of SOEs; PSO receivable factoring with state banks (BRI/BNI)
KRI: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) on PSO receivables

Risk_Driver: Regulatory reform; fertiliser market deregulation opening to private competitors
Control_Description: Active engagement with Kementan & Kemenko Perekonomian; 3-scenario business model planning (full PSO / hybrid / commercial)
KRI: Number of regulatory draft changes tracked per quarter; tabling of relevant RUU
KRI_Threshold: Any bill tabled affecting PSO mandate

Risk_Driver: Subsidiary boards prioritising commercial KPIs over group PSO distribution targets
Control_Description: Quarterly subsidiary KPI alignment review; Holding veto rights on subsidiary capex > IDR 50B; PSO target embedding in subsidiary RKAP
KRI: PSO distribution achievement rate per subsidiary

Risk_Driver: Inability to distribute subsidised fertiliser to farmers on schedule due to logistics or stockout
Control_Description: Real-time distribution monitoring dashboard (RDKK-linked); farmer complaint hotline with 48-hour SLA; media sentiment monitoring
KRI: Farmer complaint rate; media sentiment score (NLP-based)

Risk_Driver: Subsidiary cash flow deterioration triggering Significant Increase in Credit Risk (SICR) — Stage 1 to Stage 2/3 migration
Control_Description: Monthly ECL model recalibration; early warning system at SICR boundary; quarterly portfolio SICR assessment with qualitative overlays
KRI: % of intercompany loan portfolio classified Stage 2+

Risk_Description: Liquidity Risk from PSO Reimbursement Lag
Risk_Driver: Timing mismatch between production cost incurred and government PSO subsidy reimbursement (avg. 60-120 day lag)
Control_Description: Revolving credit facility maintaining minimum 3-month opex coverage; weekly 13-week rolling cash forecast; PSO receivable factoring arrangement

Risk_Driver: Global LNG price surge; domestic regulated gas price review by SKK Migas / KESDM
Control_Description: Long-term Gas Supply Agreement (GSA) with PGN covering >= 80% of annual requirement; price hedging policy for remaining 20%
KRI: Gas cost as % of COGS vs annual budget

Risk_Driver: USD-denominated raw material imports (ammonia / sulphur) against IDR revenue base
Control_Description: FX forward contracts covering >= 60% of projected USD payables; monthly FX exposure report to Board; natural hedge via any USD export revenue
KRI: Net open FX position as % of equity; IDR/USD deviation from budget rate

Risk_Driver: Supplier concentration; geopolitical disruption; port congestion at Gresik / Bontang
Control_Description: Dual/multi-sourcing policy (>= 2 approved suppliers per critical input); minimum 45-day strategic inventory buffer; monthly supplier risk scorecard
KRI: Days of Inventory on Hand (DIOH); supplier on-time delivery rate

Risk_Driver: Aging infrastructure at ammonia / urea plants; deferred capex from PSO margin compression
Control_Description: Predictive maintenance program (vibration analysis / thermography); annual major turnaround schedule; OEE dashboard with real-time alerts
KRI: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE); unplanned downtime hours/month

Risk_Driver: Remote area logistics; distributor insolvency; seasonal road inaccessibility in outer islands
Control_Description: RDKK digital tracking per kecamatan; distributor financial health scorecard (monthly); backup distributor appointment protocol per region
KRI: % of RDKK allocation distributed on schedule; distributor overdue AR days
KRI_Threshold: On-time distribution rate < 80% or AR overdue > 60 days

Risk_Driver: Toxic gas leaks (NH3 / CO2); pressure vessel failure; contractor safety management gaps
Control_Description: ISO 45001 OHSMS implementation; Process Safety Management (PSM) program; monthly HSE audit; contractor HSE pre-qualification requirement
KRI: Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (LTIFR); near-miss report rate
KRI_Threshold: LTIFR > 0.5 or near-miss reports declining (lagging indicator of reporting culture)

Risk_Driver: Board composition gaps; Laporan Tahunan deficiencies vs Permen BUMN GCG requirements
Control_Description: Annual GCG self-assessment (BUMN GCG scorecard); independent GCG audit every 2 years; Board charter and committee charter review cycle
KRI: GCG composite score; number of open internal audit recommendations
KRI_Threshold: GCG score < 75/100 or open recs closure rate < 70%

Risk_Driver: KLHK PROPER rating risk; ammonia emission limit exceedance; wastewater discharge non-compliance
Control_Description: Continuous Emission Monitoring System (CEMS) with automated alerting; quarterly PROPER compliance self-review; ISO 14001 EMS certification
KRI: PROPER rating (target: BLUE or above); permit exceedances per quarter
KRI_Threshold: PROPER rating RED or > 2 permit exceedances per quarter

Risk_Driver: DGT scrutiny of holding-subsidiary pricing; thin capitalisation risk; BEPS Action 13 CbCR obligation
Control_Description: Annual TP documentation per PMK-213; independent benchmarking study; TP risk review in quarterly tax committee; APA feasibility assessment
KRI: Tax audit coverage ratio; TP adjustment risk exposure (IDR notional)
KRI_Threshold: Any DGT audit notification within 12 months or TP exposure > IDR 50B

Risk_Driver: PSO subsidy disbursement irregularities; procurement deviations; fixed asset management gaps attracting BPK qualification
Control_Description: Pre-BPK internal audit simulation (annual); audit recommendation tracking system; PSO distribution documentation completeness checklist
KRI: Number of material BPK findings; open recommendation closure rate
